title: The Server Pack
description: Server-side performance mods, admin control mods and small tweaks.
body:
Good server side performance/ Utility mods for all servers.
Feel free to disable/remove the ones you do not want.
# **Plans**
Fabric only, modpack starts at version 1.19 and will be continually updated in the furture. I am planing these versions: 1.19, 1.19.1, 1.19.2, 1.19.3, 1.19.4, 1.20, 1.20.1, 1.20.2
## Mods 
- Ferritcore
- Memory leak fix
- Modernfix
- Chunky
- Starlight
- Servercore
- You shall not spawn
- Get it together drops
- No chat reports
- World edit
- Antixray
- Server sleep
- Chunky border
- No portal
- Deepcutting
- Stone Cobbling
- Clumps
- Lithium
- Lazy DFU
- Krypton
- Concurrent chunk managment engine
- Very many players
- Noisium
- Chunky extention
- Disable portal checks
- Vanish
- Ban hammer
- Ordered player list
- Offline player teleport
- Carpet
- Bad packets
- Let me despawn
- LuckPerms
